steps.title: Use the later synonym clue
steps.content: The sentence later refers to familiarity with erroneous versions of images. The blank should therefore describe previous contact with incorrect renditions.

steps.title: Reject illogical noun phrases
steps.content:
• Choice A: Compliance with applies to rules or orders, not images.
  • Choice C: Criteria for would mean standards for judging, which does not cause false memories here.
  • Choice D: Forfeiture of means giving something up, not encountering it.

steps.title: Choose the contact phrase
steps.content: The phrase meaning prior contact with incorrect versions matches the hypothesis the researchers tested and the later familiarity clue. The answer is B.
